meta.title: Yamas Clausthal-Zellerfeld | Greek Restaurant
meta.description: Fresh Greek cuisine in Clausthal-Zellerfeld. Gyros, souvlaki, pita, salads, burgers, pasta and halal chicken dishes.

hero.subtitle: Yamas brings Mediterranean warmth, fresh cooking and authentic Greek specialties to Clausthal-Zellerfeld.

intro.quote: In the heart of Clausthal, Greek cuisine awaits you — {fresh} and prepared with care.
intro.body: Whether gyros, souvlaki, crisp salads, chicken dishes, pasta, burgers or schnitzel — at Yamas everyone finds something to enjoy. Family-run, warm-hearted and dedicated to making every visit memorable.

signature.title: Our specialties
signature.subtitle: Dishes that tell stories — with steam, aroma and Mediterranean soul

gyros.title: Gyros from the grill
gyros.alt: Premium gyros from the grill at Yamas

souvlaki.title: Souvlaki specialties
souvlaki.description: From the charcoal grill, perfectly cooked

menuSection.title: Menu
menuSection.subtitle: Every dish composed with care — discover our Greek variety
menuSection.noResultsHint: No dishes found. Try a different search term.

halal.title: All chicken dishes are {emphasis}.
halal.body: At Yamas we value transparency and quality. Our chicken dishes are prepared to halal standards — served fresh, trustworthy and with Mediterranean care.
halal.badge: Halal chicken · Fresh from the grill

breakfast.title: Breakfast
breakfast.body: Start your day the Mediterranean way — with fresh ingredients, warm bread and the signature Yamas hospitality. A quiet moment before the day in Clausthal.

contact.title: Craving Greek?
contact.subtitle: Call us, reserve by phone or find us in Clausthal-Zellerfeld
contact.ctaBody: Fresh Greek cuisine — takeaway, delivery or dine in.

site.name: Yamas
site.subtitle: Greek Restaurant
site.reservationNote: Reservations are accepted by phone only. Please do not request table reservations by email.

privacy.intro: Protecting your personal data is important to us. This website provides information about our restaurant Yamas in Clausthal-Zellerfeld.
privacy.collectionBody: When you visit this website, technically necessary server log files are collected by the hosting provider (e.g. IP address, browser type, time of access). No further collection of personal data takes place unless you actively contact us (e.g. by phone).
privacy.externalBody: Our contact page may display an embedded Google Maps map. When the map loads, data may be transmitted to Google.
privacy.rightsBody: You have the right to information, rectification, deletion, restriction of processing and objection under applicable data protection laws.
